raw_text:
MD simulation trajectory and related files for DPPC bilayer in full hydration (Poger GROMOS 53A6_L, Gromacs 4.0.7, Reaction Field, traj 1)
Equilibrated DPPC lipid bilayer simulation ran with Gromacs 4.0.7 using Reaction Field for computing electrostatics, Poger GROMOS 53A6_L force field in full hydration (dx.doi.org/10.1002/jcc.21396), 100ns, T=323K, 128 DPPC molecules, 5841 water molecules. This data is ran for the nmrlipids.blospot.fi project. More details from nmrlipids.blospot.fi and https://github.com/NMRLipids/nmrlipids.blogspot.fi. If data is used, please cite nmrlipids.blogspot.fi project and the original publication of the parameters (dx.doi.org/10.1002/jcc.21396).
